summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar 1973 second set highlighted by an epic Weather Report Suite into Dark Star and a string of classic jams.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear soundboard quality, with reviewers calling the audio “exquisite” and “impressive.”  The show itself is lauded as one of the band’s top 1973 performances – the Weather Report Suite Prelude flowing into a marathon Dark Star, plus standout renditions of Loose Lucy, Stella Blue, Big River and more.  Overall the combination of superb sound and inspired playing makes this a must‑listen.

ai_rating.rationale: All detailed reviews are overwhelmingly positive about both musical performance and audio clarity; no significant complaints were noted, indicating an excellent show captured on a high‑quality soundboard.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers repeatedly mention the recording’s “exquisite” and “impressive” quality with no reports of dropouts, mud, or imbalance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is highlighted as the show’s centerpiece, with a seamless build from the WR Suite into Dark Star and a cascade of classic mid‑tempo numbers that keep the energy high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted for taking lead on backing vocals and delivering strong vocal presence in several tunes.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for finally “nailing” his vocal delivery on a key song (Me & My Uncle) and making it his own.
